summary: Frontend testing completed for two new features: 1) CRM/Walk-in badges on Technician Dashboard, 2) Mandatory invoice upload on Create Ticket page with invoice visibility across all role dashboards. All features verified working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed

seed_data_creation: Created test users (customer, technician, callsupport, accountant, supervisor, dispatcher) with password Muscle@846 and approved warranty for customer to enable ticket creation
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: 1) CRM/Walk-in badges show correctly on Technician Dashboard (repair queue, my recent repairs, ticket details dialog with Source field), 2) Invoice upload field is mandatory on Create Ticket page with PDF/JPG/PNG support, 3) Invoice links visible in Call Support, Supervisor Warranties, Accountant Repaired Items, Dispatcher, and Technician dashboards

details: CRM badges (blue bg-blue-600) visible on tickets in Technician Dashboard repair queue
Walk-in badges (purple bg-purple-600) visible on walk-in tickets
My Recent Repairs section shows both CRM and Walk-in badges
Ticket details dialog shows 'Source: CRM' or 'Source: Walk-in' in Status Information section
Create Ticket page has mandatory 'Purchase Invoice *' field
Submit button disabled until invoice is uploaded
Call Support Dashboard: 'Customer Invoice' section with 'View Invoice Document' link in ticket details
Supervisor Warranties: 'Customer Invoice (Review Before Approving)' prominently displayed in warranty review dialog
Accountant Dashboard: 'Invoice' column in Repaired Items tab
Dispatcher Dashboard: 'Invoice' column in dispatch queue
Technician Dashboard: Invoice link in ticket details (when invoice exists)
